title: Suki Gifts International Soft Toy (Small, Pterodactyl Dino)
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Dark blue soft boa with orange underbelly and pale blue beak
Part of the new Dinoz range from Suki Gifts International
Other sizes and styles are available
description: Product Description Cute & cuddly supersoft plush Dinosaurs from Suki Gifts famous Dinoz collection. Royal blue soft boa Pterodactyl with light blue beak, orange belly & royal blue wings with yellow underside. Approximately 16cm long. Suitable for all ages. Other sizes in different colours and styles also available in the Dinoz range. Hand wash and air dry. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Box Contains 1 x Pterodactyl Dino Sml
